rules.notes: Minecraft 1.16.5 and earlier -- including Forge 1.12.2 -- only ever shipped/ran on Java 8. Newer JDKs can refuse to launch or crash old Forge/Fabric loaders.
1.17 through 1.20.4 require Java 17 (1.17.x officially wanted Java 16, but 17 is the standard drop-in when only 8/17/21 are installed side-by-side).
1.20.5 onward -- including the 1.21.x line and the renumbered 26.x version line -- require Java 21.
